song.title: I Love Your Presence
song.author: Bethel Live
song.lyrics:
Verse . Em D C Em D C In the glory…. Of your presence…. . Em D C Em D C I find rest….….For my soul…. . Em D C Em D C In the depths…of your love…. . Em D C Em D C I find peace…..makes me whole…
Chorus .G D Am C I love I love… I love your presence .G D Am C I love I love… I love your presence .G D Am C I love I love… I love you Jesus .G D Am C I love I love… I love your presence
Bridge .G D Am C If you want it come and get it for crying out loud .G D Am C The love that He has given you was never in doubt .G D Let go of your heart . Am C Let go of your head and feel it now .G D Let go of your heart . Am C Let go of your head and feel it now!
